verdict.answer_first: A states the answer immediately: "make the flakiness reproducible before you try to fix it"; B opens with warmth before the answer: "Good instinct to fix it".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to one governing recommendation: "make the flakiness reproducible"; B is still useful but more survey-like with a bucket table.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it maps symptoms to causes and fixes, e.g. "Passes alone, fails in suite" -> "Shared/leaked state" -> "Isolate setup/teardown".
